name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #20
description: Florentine Brainrot #20 is a glitch candy rot single-panel relic built around Michelangelo and Degen Forum Relic Board. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Due di Coppe, used here as the witness card. The Due di Coppe omen matches a stain in the museum security office after midnight. The guild refuses to explain why the halo has admin rights. Serial MICH-20 carries codon marker ATGATATGTCACGAACTCGCTAACGGAGAGCTATAA; Gematria marks DUOMO at Σ 408.

attributes.value: a low-res dove dropping governance ballots
